title: Note d’orientation – Europe du nord
subtitle: Les petites exploitations et les petites entreprises agro-alimentaires d’Europe du Nord peuvent-elles contribuer à la sécurité alimentaire durable?
description: A policy orientation note from the EU-funded SALSA project examining how small farms and agri-food businesses in Northern Europe can support sustainable food security. It outlines farm typologies, regional challenges in France, Scotland, and Norway, and offers policy recommendations on land access, cooperation, climate resilience, and targeted financial support.
